result.diff:
diff --git a/lunar_forge/tools/dependencies.py b/lunar_forge/tools/dependencies.py
index 38d05ae..62ccc64 100644
--- a/lunar_forge/tools/dependencies.py
+++ b/lunar_forge/tools/dependencies.py
@@ -33,9 +33,19 @@ _LOCKFILES = (
     "poetry.lock",
 )
 _URL_CREDENTIALS = re.compile(r"(?i)([a-z][a-z0-9+.-]*://)[^/@\s]+@")
+_SECRET_VALUE = r"""(?:"[^"]*"|'[^']*'|[^\s]+)"""
 _SECRET_ASSIGNMENT = re.compile(
     r"(?i)\b([A-Z0-9_]*(?:API[_-]?KEY|TOKEN|SECRET|PASSWORD)[A-Z0-9_]*"
-    r"\s*=\s*)([^\s]+)"
+    r"\s*=\s*)"
+    + _SECRET_VALUE
+)
+_SECRET_OPTION = re.compile(
+    r"(?i)(--?[A-Z0-9_-]*(?:API[_-]?KEY|TOKEN|SECRET|PASSWORD)[A-Z0-9_-]*"
+    r"(?:\s*=\s*|\s+))"
+    + _SECRET_VALUE
+)
+_BEARER_CREDENTIAL = re.compile(
+    r"(?i)\b(Bearer\s+)[A-Z0-9._~+/-]{8,}"
 )
 _API_KEY = re.compile(
     r"(?i)\b(?:sk-(?:ant-)?|gh[pousr]_|github_pat_)[a-z0-9_-]{8,}\b"
@@ -714,[REDACTED] +724,8 @@ def _specifier(value: Any) -> str:
 def _sanitize(value: str) -> str:
     sanitized = _URL_CREDENTIALS.sub(r"\[REDACTED][REDACTED]@", value)
     sanitized = _SECRET_ASSIGNMENT.sub(r"\[REDACTED][REDACTED]", sanitized)
+    sanitized = _SECRET_OPTION.sub(r"\[REDACTED][REDACTED]", sanitized)
+    sanitized = _BEARER_CREDENTIAL.sub(r"\[REDACTED][REDACTED]", sanitized)
     return _API_KEY.sub("[REDACTED]", sanitized)

diff --git a/tests/test_dependency_summary.py b/tests/test_dependency_summary.py
index 8f5a23d..482e635 100644
--- a/tests/test_dependency_summary.py
+++ b/tests/test_dependency_summary.py
@@ -205,12 +205,24 @@ def test_dependency_summary_handles_mixed_markers_and_bounds_results(tmp_path):
 
 def test_dependency_summary_redacts_credentials_in_returned_metadata(tmp_path):
     secret = [REDACTED]
+    quoted_secret = "quoted credential value"
+    option_secret = "option-secret-value"
+    bearer_secret = "bearer.secret.value"
     (tmp_path / "requirements.txt").write_text(
         f"private-lib @ https://{secret}@example.com/archive.whl\n",
         encoding="utf-8",
     )
     (tmp_path / "package.json").write_text(
-        json.dumps({"scripts": {"check": f"API_TOKEN={secret} tool check"}}),
+        json.dumps(
+            {
+                "scripts": {
+                    "assignment": f'API_TOKEN="{quoted_secret}" tool check',
+                    "check": f"API_TOKEN={secret} tool check",
+                    "option": f"tool --api-key {option_secret} check",
+                    "bearer": f"tool --header 'Bearer [REDACTED],
+                }
+            }
+        ),
         encoding="utf-8",
     )
 
@@ -218,5 +230,[REDACTED] @@ def test_dependency_summary_redacts_credentials_in_returned_metadata(tmp_path):
     serialized = json.dumps(result)
 
     assert result["ok"] is True
-    assert secret not in serialized
+    for value in (secret, quoted_secret, option_secret, bearer_secret):
+        assert value not in serialized
     assert "[REDACTED]" in serialized
